title: Why Super Micro Computer Rallied Over 60% in the First Half of the Year Super Micro was seemingly vindicated from its accounting scandal at the end of 2024.  Shares of AI-focused server-maker Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ: SMCI) rallied 60.8% in the first half of the year, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence.  Super Micro entered 2025 after a somewhat disastrous second half of 2024, when it was attacked by a short-seller, followed by its auditor resigning in October.
